planning_basis.observed_pr: Completed TASK-0001, TASK-0003, TASK-0004, and TASK-0005 cycles measured from the canonical 72-event snapshot.
planning_basis.current_merged_formula: 751 historical completed baseline + 171 merged TASK-0013 runtime = 922
planning_basis.strategy: Rolling-wave planning: only detailed tasks are executable; reserves are non-executable.
planning_basis.production_loc_definition: Count nonblank, non-comment executable-source lines in shipped, installed, or runtime/installation source: non-test .go and shipped .py, .sh, or .c. Excludes tests, planning/review documents, task/operator docs, workflows, declarative systemd/PAM/sudoers configuration, generated, and vendor.

measurement_rules.stage_pairing: same task, lap, stage, and attempt start-terminal pairs only
measurement_rules.active_wait: record active_ms and wait_ms as separate observations; never sum them to invent elapsed time
measurement_rules.retries: maximum propagated task-level retry counter across the complete cycle
measurement_rules.classifications: retain raw records with source_event_id and nullable superseded_by; effective values are only correction-validated unsuperseded records
measurement_rules.preflight: exclude stage=preflight from cycle and stage totals; preflight failure is not_started
measurement_rules.throughput: no SLOC/minute, average velocity, regression, or other fixed throughput assumption

wave.formula: 922 actual baseline + 0 merged (unfinished TASK-0014) + 280 (TASK-0015) + 120 (TASK-0008) + 0 (TASK-0009) = 1322; TASK-0010 through TASK-0012 arithmetic is speculative and invalid until TASK-0009 replan
owner_lineage: TASK-0009 measurement PASS+merge and explicit replan
wave.later_reserve_rule: Neither later milestone receives PLAN, branch, DEV, PR-ready detail, or production allocation until TASK-0012 independent REVIEW and QA both PASS and it merges. TASK-0010 through TASK-0012 arithmetic remains speculative and invalid until TASK-0009 independently passes, merges, and explicitly replans it.

tasks.title: core lease state, readiness, and absolute expiry
TOTP replay, rate limits, and concurrency
Codex CLI, socket access, and redaction
terminated combined daemon/backend attempt
tasks.fixture_elevation_needs: None after termination; the unfinished draft was never merged or installed.
tasks.lap_1: Consumed by planning and contract repair; no gate-ready product candidate was produced.
tasks.lap_2: Consumed by interrupted DEV and remeasurement; the combined draft exceeded its task hard guard before tests and was not reviewed, QA-approved, committed, or merged.
tasks.split_stop_rule: Terminal. User-approved Disposition 2 preserves both Lap records and moves all unmerged functionality to TASK-0013 and TASK-0014; TASK-0007 cannot resume.
tasks.measurement_lineage: Canonical TASK-0007 Lap 1 and Lap 2 events remain the source for the planning_defect termination; merged production delta is zero.
tasks.later_reserve_eligibility: Later audit/attestation/manual-canary reserve remains ineligible until TASK-0012 PASS+merge.

tasks.title: process-local ready/otp runtime assembly
tasks.fixture_elevation_needs: Injected lease clock, verifier secret, and in-process IPC requests; no socket, seed file, network, credentials, or elevation.
tasks.lap_1: After approved PLAN and QA_PLAN, implement the process-local runtime only; run go test ./internal/backend ./internal/ipc ./internal/lease and capture exact ready/otp admission, denial, close, registration, and regression evidence.
tasks.lap_2: Independent REVIEW runs focused and repository-native full checks; QA independently exercises routing, payload mutations, state denial, close, bounded registration, and existing IPC/lease regressions; main owns Git.
tasks.split_stop_rule: Stop before or during DEV if a seed/listener/lifecycle path is required, runtime tests are not gate-ready in Lap 1, cumulative forecast or measurement exceeds 925, or another production path is needed; never use Lap 3.
tasks.measurement_lineage: Replacement for the runtime half of terminated TASK-0007; record production/test SLOC, paired stage timing, active/wait, retries, classifications, null reasons, and time-only contingency.
tasks.later_reserve_eligibility: Later audit/attestation/manual-canary reserve remains ineligible until TASK-0012 PASS+merge.

tasks.title: secure bounded seed and daemon lifecycle
tasks.fixture_elevation_needs: None after closure; the reviewed candidate was never merged or installed.
tasks.lap_1: Stopped on local planning-boundary churn before a reviewable product candidate was completed.
tasks.lap_2: Produced an unmerged candidate, but independent REVIEW failed on immediate secret wipe and deterministic test coverage; no Lap 3 is permitted.
tasks.split_stop_rule: Terminal. Preserve both Lap records and the independent REVIEW FAIL; move the unmerged boundary to TASK-0015 without resetting counters or adopting the failed candidate as merged product.
tasks.measurement_lineage: TASK-0014 observed a 278-SLOC candidate but merged production delta is zero. Preserve its final REVIEW FAIL as the source for TASK-0015 acceptance and test coverage.
tasks.later_reserve_eligibility: Later audit/attestation/manual-canary reserve remains ineligible until TASK-0012 PASS+merge.

tasks.title: secure daemon review-gap replacement
tasks.fixture_elevation_needs: Temporary Unix socket and injected descriptor-relative openat/O_NOFOLLOW seed fixture simulating root-owned mode-0600 metadata without host mutation; no real service installation.
tasks.lap_1: With PLAN and TASK-first QA_PLAN approved during the preceding partial interval, start DEV within 5 minutes, complete implementation and deterministic tests by minute 20, independent REVIEW by minute 25, then QA and main-owned Git closure by minute 30.
tasks.lap_2: Exceptional only when Lap 1 leaves concrete estimated work, no redesign or research, one or two classified failure causes, and a fix demonstrably possible in the first 20 minutes; otherwise split the Task. No Lap 3.
tasks.split_stop_rule: Local SLOC projections are warnings for Main judgment, not automatic reapproval gates. Stop for a security-boundary change, scope expansion, unreadable compression, target-overflow requiring ordered shedding, or the absolute 1800 global hard limit; never weaken the seed/lifecycle controls or use Lap 3.
tasks.measurement_lineage: Replacement for unfinished TASK-0014. Baseline 922 + readable forecast 280 = cumulative 1202; the TASK-0014 REVIEW FAIL supplies the immediate-wipe and complete deterministic-test acceptance gaps. Record planning/wait separately and target one counted Lap.
tasks.later_reserve_eligibility: Later audit/attestation/manual-canary reserve remains ineligible until TASK-0012 PASS+merge.

tasks.title: bounded active-lease authorization operation
tasks.fixture_elevation_needs: None; fake-clock in-process runtime tests and existing temporary Unix-socket IPC tests only.
tasks.lap_1: With PLAN and TASK-first QA_PLAN approved in the partial interval, add one fixed payload-free authorize operation whose only positive result means the process-local lease is active at the decision point; preserve ready/otp semantics, one custom registration slot, bounded boolean responses, cancellation, and close fail-closed behavior; complete DEV, independent REVIEW/QA, and Main Git closure in one counted Lap.
tasks.lap_2: Exceptional only for one or two concrete review/QA findings requiring no redesign, research, Task redefinition, or fixture change and demonstrably reviewable within the first 20 minutes; otherwise split. No Lap 3.
tasks.split_stop_rule: Stop before DEV if authorization requires payload, identity material in the response, lease deadline disclosure, persistence, sudo/push coupling, or a protocol version change. Stop/replan above the local 1230 trigger; 1250 is the Task target and 1350 the absolute local guard. Never alter ready/otp meaning, weaken expiry, or consume the existing custom registration capacity.
tasks.measurement_lineage: Requirement gap discovered during TASK-0008 partial preflight: ready calls BeginReadiness and therefore denies an active lease, while TASK-0008 needs a live allow decision and forbids runtime/IPC changes. Baseline is merged TASK-0015 cumulative 1200; forecast +20 = 1220.
tasks.later_reserve_eligibility: Later audit/attestation/manual-canary reserve remains ineligible until TASK-0012 PASS+merge.

tasks.title: sudo live check and no cache
tasks.fixture_elevation_needs: Isolated Ubuntu sudo/PAM fixture, disposable dedicated identity, controlled clock/socket, and approved narrow elevation/rollback procedure; never mutate workstation sudo policy.
tasks.lap_1: After TASK-0016 merge and approved revised plans, consume its fixed payload-free authorize operation for each invocation and implement declarative timestamp-cache disablement; run go test ./cmd/codex-authority-sudo ./internal/ipc plus the isolated sudo fixture covering allow, expiry, daemon unavailable/restart, malformed/unauthorized reply, and two consecutive invocations.
tasks.lap_2: Independent REVIEW runs focused tests and repository-native full check; QA uses the isolated elevated fixture to prove a live unexpired lease permits and every deny case fails closed with no cached reuse; main owns Git closure.
tasks.split_stop_rule: Classify not_started/environment_issue if the isolated elevated fixture or rollback proof is unavailable. Split before DEV if more than one client entrypoint and declarative policy is required, forecast exceeds the post-reestimate trigger 1325, or platform/PAM differences cannot fit two laps; never weaken live-per-call or no-cache behavior. A forecast or candidate above target 1350 stops for explicit replan and exact ordered shedding review; hard guard 1450 is absolute.
tasks.measurement_lineage: TASK-0008 partial preflight exposed that ready denies an active lease; TASK-0016 supplies the missing bounded authorize operation. After TASK-0016 actual SLOC is known, explicitly revise TASK-0008's forecast and 1325/1350/1450 disposition before DEV. Record fixture/elevation waits separately, paired stage timing, active/wait, retries, raw/effective classifications, source IDs, null reasons, and time-only 20% contingency; no SLOC throughput sizing.
tasks.later_reserve_eligibility: Later audit/attestation/manual-canary reserve remains ineligible until TASK-0012 PASS+merge.

tasks.title: first zero-SLOC measurement gate
tasks.fixture_elevation_needs: Read-only frozen canonical JSONL snapshot; no elevation, network, product fixture, or operational-log write.
tasks.lap_1: After TASK-0013, TASK-0015, and TASK-0008 merge, freeze the completed-event snapshot and regenerate provenance-complete historical plus new-wave SLOC/test/stage/active/wait/retry/raw/effective classification evidence, applying ceil(observed non-preflight time * 1.20) only to observable time.
tasks.lap_2: Independent REVIEW and QA each run canonical parse/unique-ID/correction-edge checks, independently regenerate measurement and cap arithmetic, and run the repository-native full Go/format/diff checks; main owns Git. TASK-0010 through TASK-0012 speculative arithmetic is invalidated and must be explicitly replanned from this evidence; push-to-v2 remains a TASK-0009 decision, never a silent selection.
tasks.split_stop_rule: Stop on missing or contradictory canonical evidence, non-reproducible arithmetic, actual cumulative above target 1350, or inability to independently regenerate in Lap 2; classify before retry and do not bypass explicit replanning. Target 1500 may be exceeded only after an explicit later replan; push-to-v2 remains a TASK-0009 decision, never a silent selection.
tasks.measurement_lineage: Include terminated TASK-0007, unfinished TASK-0014, and completed replacement TASK-0013/TASK-0015 lineage, preserve null with reasons, validate every correction target earlier in file order and same task/lap with smaller sequence, retain raw source IDs and superseded_by, and derive effective values only after validation.
tasks.later_reserve_eligibility: Audit/attestation/manual-canary reserve remains non-executable until TASK-0012 PASS+merge; no converted milestone remains simultaneously reserved and executable.

tasks.title: local push policy and validation
tasks.fixture_elevation_needs: Temporary worktree and local bare repository matrix; no network, credentials, child Git process, or elevation; denied cases must prove no fake transport boundary is crossed.
tasks.lap_1: After TASK-0009 PASS+merge and approved plans, validate exact configured repository, clean tree, main or task/TASK-* branch, and one-ref update; reject wrong repo/ref, dirty tree, force, tag, delete, multiple-ref, and ambiguous local Git state; run go test ./internal/push.
tasks.lap_2: Independent REVIEW runs focused tests and repository-native full check; QA independently mutates every local condition and proves each denial cannot cross the fake transport boundary; main owns Git.
tasks.split_stop_rule: Stop if validation requires remote state, credentials, or a second policy language; stop if forecast exceeds the post-reestimate stop 1380, the fixture cannot prove zero transport on denial, or Lap 1 is not review-ready.
tasks.measurement_lineage: Record exact local fixture state, stage pairs, active/wait, retries, raw/effective classifications, source IDs, null reasons, and time-only contingency; do not infer duration or size from throughput.
tasks.later_reserve_eligibility: Later audit/attestation/manual-canary reserve remains ineligible until TASK-0012 PASS+merge.

tasks.title: token custody and system-Git non-force push
tasks.fixture_elevation_needs: TASK-0013 instance handler seam, TASK-0014 explicit broker construction call, and dedicated caller UID; local bare remote, fake short-lived GitHub App token provider, system-Git binary, credential-capture sentinel, live-lease fixture, no network and no elevation.
tasks.lap_1: After TASK-0010 PASS+merge and approved plans, implement the bounded caller, OperationPush/PushRequest admission, backend registration and UID/live-lease/policy gates, in-memory token custody, and one system-Git single-ref non-force path; run go test ./cmd/codex-authority ./cmd/codex-authority-broker ./cmd/codex-authority-push ./internal/ipc ./internal/push ./internal/backend.
tasks.lap_2: Independent REVIEW runs the focused suite, malformed/unknown-operation and credential-capture mutations, then repository-native full check; QA proves exactly one authorized push handler with correct UID, live lease, and TASK-0010 policy, and denies old client, wrong UID, malformed/expired authority, leak, force, and ambiguity cases before custody/Git; main owns Git.
exclusions: broker main changes beyond one explicit fixed push registration call
broker ready/otp, seed, signal, or socket lifecycle changes
tasks.split_stop_rule: Stop before DEV if caller schema cannot stay bounded, the explicit broker registration call cannot remain isolated, SO_PEERCRED cannot distinguish configured UID, token injection leaks through a named channel, system Git cannot be captured deterministically, the forecast exceeds post-reestimate stop 1495, or the retained core cannot fit readably within 153; never weaken authorization, custody, schema, redaction, or non-force behavior.
tasks.measurement_lineage: Forecast allocation is 16 caller + 4 broker call + 26 protocol/schema + 36 registration/gates + 33 custody + 38 system-Git/redaction = 153, not throughput. Removed scope is convenience UX, generic frameworks, cache/retry/telemetry, and rich diagnostics only. Record stage pairs, active/wait, retries, raw/effective classifications, source IDs, null reasons, preflight exclusion, and time-only contingency.
tasks.later_reserve_eligibility: Later audit/attestation/manual-canary reserve remains ineligible until TASK-0012 PASS+merge.

tasks.title: final zero-SLOC measurement and later-reserve gate
tasks.fixture_elevation_needs: Read-only frozen completed TASK-0010/TASK-0011 event snapshot; no elevation, network, product fixture, or operational-log write.
tasks.lap_1: After TASK-0011 merge, freeze the wave snapshot and regenerate full historical plus wave SLOC/test/time/active/wait/retry/classification evidence, reconcile actual capacity to target 1500 and hard 1800, and record eligibility evidence for later audit/attestation/manual-canary lineage.
tasks.lap_2: Independent REVIEW and QA each regenerate evidence, run canonical correction and repository-native full Go/format/diff checks, validate actual target/hard reserve, and prove no later DEV is enabled; main owns Git.
tasks.split_stop_rule: Stop on canonical defects, unexplained cap drift, actual above 1500 without approved contingency disposition, any hard-limit risk, or inability to close REVIEW/QA in Lap 2; later reserve PLAN/DEV remains blocked until this gate passes and merges.
tasks.measurement_lineage: Apply the exact TASK-0009 correction predicate and raw/effective provenance to the frozen stream; compare measured baseline and wave delta, preserve null reasons, and reconcile actual 1500/1800 capacities without fixed throughput.
tasks.later_reserve_eligibility: Only after independent REVIEW PASS, independent QA PASS, and main merge may MILESTONE-audit-attestation then MILESTONE-manual-canary-rollback receive PLAN; both remain non-executable beforehand.

future_milestones.title: minimal audit and source-free attestation reserve
future_milestones.description: Non-executable later reserve for minimal external-trace audit and source-free attested artifact.
future_milestones.eligible_for: ineligible for PLAN/DEV/branch/PR-ready detail until TASK-0012 independent REVIEW and QA PASS and merge.

future_milestones.title: manual canary and rollback evidence reserve
future_milestones.description: Non-executable later reserve retaining a manual verified canary/rollback runbook and evidence.
future_milestones.eligible_for: ineligible for PLAN/DEV/branch/PR-ready detail until TASK-0012 and the audit/attestation owner gate pass.

rules.preflight: excluded from cycle and stage timing; preflight failure means not_started
rules.contingency: ceil(observed non-preflight time * 1.20); null remains null and SLOC receives no multiplier
rules.evidence: derive next-wave sizing from observed completed cycles and qualitative scope/risk
rules.sparse_evidence: do not assume fixed SLOC throughput, LOC velocity, average, or regression
rules.conversion: terminate TASK-0007, preserve unfinished TASK-0014, deliver replacements TASK-0013/TASK-0015, then continue TASK-0008 through TASK-0012; later milestones remain reserved
rules.remeasurement: TASK-0009 follows TASK-0008 and TASK-0012 follows TASK-0011 before any later wave
rules.corrections: for every correction, require nonempty annotations.corrects_event_id, target earlier in frozen file order, same task_id and lap_id, and target.sequence < correction.sequence; only then set superseded_by and derive effective values
rules.missing_values: retain non-derivable numeric values as null with a reason; zero requires explicit evidence
rules.correction_predicate: jq -s -e 'to_entries as $rows | all($rows[]; if .value.event == "correction" then . as $correction | any($rows[]; .key < $correction.key and .value.event_id == $correction.value.annotations.corrects_event_id and .value.task_id == $correction.value.task_id and .value.lap_id == $correction.value.lap_id and .value.sequence < $correction.value.sequence) else true end)' /home/ubuntu/git/agent-harness-work/lap30/events.jsonl

repository_checks.focused_rule: Each production Task runs its package-scoped command and additive fixture checks listed in its contract.

delivery_guardrails.production_sloc_counting: Count nonblank, non-comment executable-source lines only within the production-LOC definition; TASK-0006 delta must remain exactly 0 and cumulative baseline exactly 751.
delivery_guardrails.no_compression: LOC caps never authorize semicolon or one-line packing, collapsed error handling, cryptic names, removal of security comments, test deletion, or combining functions solely to reduce LOC. REVIEW rejects these patterns; gofmt and idiomatic structure remain mandatory.
delivery_guardrails.projected_cap_trigger: The original 90% trigger forces explicit split/re-estimation and PLAN/QA_PLAN approval. After it fires, the approved per-Task absolute stop in projected_cap_trigger_sloc applies with explicit forecast headroom; target 1500 and hard 1800 are unchanged.
delivery_guardrails.candidate_cap_trigger: Candidate above target cap stops even below hard; crossing or forecasting above hard stops safely. Shed only in the exact listed order after approved replan.
delivery_guardrails.global_target_and_hard: 1500 is the mandatory-v1 planning target; overflow requires replan and shedding audit. 1800 is an unconditional production-SLOC hard limit and cannot be raised.
ordered_feature_shedding: automated canary executable; retain manual runbook/evidence
rich status/JSON UX; retain activate and immediate revoke
rich audit schema/correlation; retain correlation ID, actor, scope, result, and expiry
precomputed pack-size/history diagnostics; retain exact repo/ref/clean-tree validation and normal non-force rejection
remote-OID prefetch/race diagnostics; retain standard non-force rejection and generic failure
automated installer/rollback executable; retain declarative units and manual verified install/rollback
move GitHub push to v2, leaving TOTP full-sudo authority as v1
delivery_guardrails.later_reserve: At the TASK-0009 replan-gate forecast, 178 SLOC remains to target 1500 and 478 to hard 1800. TASK-0010 through TASK-0012 arithmetic is speculative and invalid until TASK-0009 PASS+merge and explicit replan; target 1500 may be exceeded only after that explicit later replan. TASK-0012 PASS+merge -> MILESTONE-audit-attestation -> MILESTONE-manual-canary-rollback; no silent reserve borrowing.

acceptance_checks: The user-approved Disposition 2 atomically updates backlog, terminates TASK-0007, creates TASK-0013/TASK-0014, and propagates TASK-0008 through TASK-0012.
TASK-0007 and unfinished TASK-0014 are non-executable with zero merged SLOC; TASK-0013 and TASK-0015 own the runtime and seed/daemon boundaries and later milestones remain reserved.

Index and every contract agree on identity, status/executable flag, dependency, increment, cumulative target/hard cap, paths, entrypoint, fixture/elevation, laps, exclusions, split rule, measurement lineage, and reserve eligibility.
TASK-0006 production SLOC delta is exactly 0 and cumulative measured baseline remains exactly 751.
TASK-0009 and TASK-0012 apply the deterministic same-task/same-lap/earlier-file/smaller-sequence correction predicate before effective values.
Every independent REVIEW and QA runs the focused checks plus GOCACHE="$(mktemp -d)" go test ./..., gofmt, git diff --check, and jq JSON validation as applicable.
Forecasts, approved post-trigger stops, target/hard reserves, mandatory controls, exact shedding order, and no-compression rules remain binding.

human_gate_evidence.review_checklist: Record independent contract/index comparison, fixture and focused/full checks, correction predicate, production-SLOC count, caps/reserves, and no-compression/guardrail compliance.
human_gate_evidence.qa_checklist: Independently repeat the focused/full checks, canonical measurement and correction arithmetic, exact seven-file scope, contract/index mapping, dependency walk, reserve gate, and PASS/FAIL classification.
